startup_summary.idea: A smart parcel locker network for apartment buildings, university campuses, and small retail pickup points in Tunisia that lets e-commerce sellers and local delivery companies drop off packages into secure connected lockers for 24/7 pickup instead of failed home delivery attempts.
startup_summary.problem: Home delivery is often inefficient because customers are not available at delivery time, which creates repeated delivery attempts, delays, extra costs, and poor customer experience for e-commerce sellers and delivery operators.
startup_summary.target_customer: E-commerce businesses, local courier partners, and retail pickup partners in Tunisia, especially Tunis, Sfax, Sousse, and university or apartment zones.
startup_summary.how_it_works: Couriers place parcels into connected lockers, customers receive a code or notification, and they pick up their package securely at any time.
startup_summary.business_model: Subscription + usage-based revenue model, with businesses paying recurring fees.

market_existence.summary: The startup idea targets Tunisia specifically with physical lockers, while existing solutions are either app-based or lack geographic focus.

relevant_existing_solutions.what_it_does: Offers app-based package management for residences
relevant_existing_solutions.similarity_to_startup: Similar concept, but different geographic focus and technology

relevant_existing_solutions.what_it_does: Focuses on residential package delivery logistics
relevant_existing_solutions.similarity_to_startup: Similar concept, but different geographic focus and technology

relevant_existing_solutions.what_it_does: Vague business partnership firm in Tunisia

uncertainty_notes: Global locker systems like Loxbox/Smartbox Lockers may pose competition

mvp.mvp_summary: A network of compact, solar-powered parcel lockers with RFID access in high-density Tunisian urban areas, enabling customers to retrieve online orders anytime while reducing delivery failures for merchants.
must_haves: Compact locker units with touchscreen interface and RFID reader for customer access
Backend dashboard for merchants to track parcel inventory and locker status
Mobile app for customers to view order status and access codes
Pre-installed solar panel and rechargeable battery for standalone operation
Wi-Fi and cellular connectivity with local data storage for offline access
Modular design allowing partner technicians to perform basic maintenance
12-month warranty covering manufacturing defects excluding misuse
user_journey: Customer receives order confirmation with locker location and access code
Customer scans QR code to unlock parcel compartment
Merchant uploads parcel inventory to backend system
Delivery operator places package in locker with tracking ID
Customer retrieves package using RFID tag or access code
System logs pickup completion and updates inventory
acceptance_criteria: Lockers successfully store and retrieve parcels using RFID or code access
Backend dashboard accurately reflects real-time inventory and locker status
Customers can access lockers without internet connectivity using stored data
Partners can perform basic maintenance without specialized tools
Warranty claims are processed for manufacturing defects within 12 months
Lockers operate for 72 hours on a single solar charge
out_of_scope: Advanced analytics or delivery route optimization
Customized locker sizes for specific use cases
Real-time GPS tracking of individual parcels

minimum_roles_responsibilities.responsibility_or_description: Owns product strategy, pricing, deployment model, and operational rules. Manages B2B partnerships and revenue model execution.
Develops and maintains IoT hardware, firmware, backend systems, and connectivity protocols. Ensures device reliability and security.
Manages device installation, inventory tracking, provisioning, and field support. Coordinates with logistics partners for locker placement.

materials_equipment: Packaging materials for shipping and installation
important_operational_notes: Onboarding e-commerce, courier, and retail partners for locker integration
Device health monitoring and connectivity tracking
Incident resolution for hardware failures and connectivity issues
Inventory management for units, spare parts, and replacements
Coordination with logistics providers for last-mile delivery optimization
Customer support for locker access issues and usage guidance

employees_and_wages.why_needed: Founding team member responsible for product strategy, partnerships, and revenue model execution

employees_and_wages.role: IoT Systems, Backend Development, Hardware Integration
employees_and_wages.why_needed: Technical cofounder responsible for IoT hardware, firmware, backend systems, and connectivity protocols
